title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: PARKINSON'S RESOURCES OF OREGON CENTRAL OREGON HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and services for patients and families living with a diagnosis of Parkinson's disease. Services include support groups, exercise and speech classes, education workshops, case management, and counseling. Offers hybrid formats, online, in-person groups, and outdoor activities. 354 NE Greenwood Avenue #108 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals with Parkinson's Disease and their caregivers and friends Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm by appointment Email (541) 668-6599 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 668-6599 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Case/Care Management * Parkinson's Disease Health/Disability Related Counseling * Parkinson's Disease Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Parkinson's Disease Therapeutic Exercise * Parkinson's Disease If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
